examples.en: I apply moisturizer every night before bed.
examples.zh: 我每晚睡前塗保濕乳液。

examples.en: This moisturizer keeps my skin soft in winter.
examples.zh: 這款保濕霜讓我的皮膚在冬天保持柔嫩。

img: hand applying white face cream jar

examples.en: Use a gentle cleanser to wash your face.
examples.zh: 用溫和的洗面乳洗臉。

examples.en: This foaming cleanser removes makeup easily.
examples.zh: 這款泡沫洗面乳能輕鬆卸妝。

img: foaming facial cleanser bottle bathroom

examples.en: She pats toner onto her skin after cleansing.
examples.zh: 她洗臉後把化妝水輕拍在皮膚上。

examples.en: A good toner balances your skin.
examples.zh: 好的化妝水能平衡膚質。

img: cotton pad toner bottle skincare

examples.en: Vitamin C serum brightens the skin.
examples.zh: 維他命C精華液能提亮膚色。

examples.en: Apply the serum before your moisturizer.
examples.zh: 在保濕霜之前塗上精華液。

img: dropper serum bottle glass skincare

examples.en: Don't forget to wear sunscreen at the beach.
examples.zh: 去海邊別忘了擦防曬乳。

examples.en: This sunscreen protects against UV rays.
examples.zh: 這款防曬乳能抵擋紫外線。

img: sunscreen tube lotion beach sun

examples.en: Exfoliate your skin twice a week.
examples.zh: 一週去角質兩次。

examples.en: Exfoliating removes dead skin cells.
examples.zh: 去角質能去除老廢角質。

img: scrub exfoliating skin hand shower

examples.en: She blended the foundation with a sponge.
examples.zh: 她用海綿把粉底推勻。

examples.en: This foundation matches my skin tone.
examples.zh: 這款粉底和我的膚色很搭。

img: liquid foundation bottle makeup sponge

examples.en: Use concealer to hide dark circles.
examples.zh: 用遮瑕膏遮蓋黑眼圈。

examples.en: A little concealer covers the pimple.
examples.zh: 一點遮瑕膏就能蓋住痘痘。

img: concealer stick makeup under eye

examples.en: She put on mascara to lengthen her lashes.
examples.zh: 她塗睫毛膏讓睫毛變長。

examples.en: This mascara is waterproof.
examples.zh: 這款睫毛膏防水。

img: mascara wand black eyelashes closeup

examples.en: She drew a thin line with eyeliner.
examples.zh: 她用眼線筆畫了一條細線。

examples.en: Black eyeliner makes eyes look bigger.
examples.zh: 黑色眼線讓眼睛看起來更大。

img: eyeliner pen drawing eye makeup

examples.en: She chose a pink eyeshadow for the party.
examples.zh: 她為派對挑了粉色眼影。

examples.en: Blend the eyeshadow with a brush.
examples.zh: 用刷子把眼影暈開。

img: eyeshadow palette colorful makeup brush

examples.en: A touch of blush adds color to her cheeks.
examples.zh: 一點腮紅為她的臉頰增添氣色。

examples.en: She swept blush across her cheekbones.
examples.zh: 她把腮紅刷在顴骨上。

img: pink blush compact makeup cheek

examples.en: She wore red lipstick to the dinner.
examples.zh: 她擦紅色口紅去晚餐。

examples.en: This lipstick lasts all day.
examples.zh: 這支口紅可以持妝一整天。

img: red lipstick tube open makeup

examples.en: Lip gloss gives your lips a shiny look.
examples.zh: 唇蜜讓嘴唇看起來亮亮的。

examples.en: She added lip gloss over her lipstick.
examples.zh: 她在口紅上再擦了唇蜜。

img: shiny lip gloss wand pink lips

examples.en: Apply primer before foundation for a smooth base.
examples.zh: 上粉底前先擦妝前乳打造平滑底妝。

examples.en: Primer helps makeup stay on longer.
examples.zh: 妝前乳能讓妝容更持久。

img: makeup primer tube smooth face base

examples.en: She dabbed highlighter on her cheekbones.
examples.zh: 她在顴骨點上打亮。

examples.en: Highlighter gives your skin a glow.
examples.zh: 打亮讓肌膚散發光澤。

img: glowing highlighter powder cheekbone shimmer

examples.en: She loves the fresh fragrance of this perfume.
examples.zh: 她喜歡這款香水清新的香氣。

examples.en: The lotion has a light floral fragrance.
examples.zh: 這款乳液有淡淡的花香。

img: elegant perfume bottle fragrance flowers

examples.en: She keeps her cosmetics in a small bag.
examples.zh: 她把化妝品放在一個小包裡。

examples.en: The store sells natural cosmetics.
examples.zh: 這家店賣天然化妝品。

img: cosmetics collection makeup products table

examples.en: She has a clear, healthy complexion.
examples.zh: 她有著乾淨健康的膚色。

examples.en: Enough sleep improves your complexion.
examples.zh: 充足的睡眠能改善面色。

img: close up clear healthy facial skin

examples.en: This cream reduces fine wrinkles.
examples.zh: 這款乳霜能減少細紋。

examples.en: Wrinkles appear as we get older.
examples.zh: 隨著年紀增長會出現皺紋。

img: close up skin wrinkles around eye

examples.en: This mask cleans out clogged pores.
examples.zh: 這款面膜能清潔阻塞的毛孔。

examples.en: Cold water helps tighten pores.
examples.zh: 冷水有助於收縮毛孔。

img: close up facial skin pores texture

examples.en: This gel treats acne on the chin.
examples.zh: 這款凝膠能治療下巴的痘痘。

examples.en: Many teenagers struggle with acne.
examples.zh: 許多青少年為粉刺所苦。

img: close up skin acne breakout face

examples.en: Concealer can hide a small blemish.
examples.zh: 遮瑕膏能遮住小斑點。

examples.en: The cream fades dark blemishes over time.
examples.zh: 這款乳霜能慢慢淡化深色斑點。

img: close up skin blemish spot cheek

examples.en: She booked a facial at the spa.
examples.zh: 她在水療中心預約了做臉。

examples.en: A monthly facial keeps my skin fresh.
examples.zh: 每月做一次臉讓我的皮膚保持清爽。

img: woman spa facial treatment relaxing

examples.en: I put on a sheet mask before bed.
examples.zh: 我睡前敷了一片面膜。

examples.en: This clay mask deep-cleans the skin.
examples.zh: 這款泥面膜能深層清潔肌膚。

img: woman wearing sheet face mask relax

examples.en: The barber trimmed my hair a little.
examples.zh: 理髮師幫我修剪了一點頭髮。

examples.en: Could you trim the ends, please?
examples.zh: 可以幫我修一下髮尾嗎?

img: hairdresser trimming hair scissors salon

examples.en: She cut her bangs shorter this week.
examples.zh: 她這週把瀏海剪短了。

examples.en: Bangs can change your whole look.
examples.zh: 瀏海能改變整個造型。

img: woman with straight bangs front hair

examples.en: She got blonde highlights at the salon.
examples.zh: 她在髮廊做了金色挑染。

examples.en: Highlights add dimension to your hair.
examples.zh: 挑染能讓頭髮更有層次。

img: blonde hair highlights salon color strands

examples.en: She decided to dye her hair brown.
examples.zh: 她決定把頭髮染成棕色。

examples.en: Don't dye your hair too often.
examples.zh: 別太常染頭髮。

img: hairdresser dyeing hair color brush foil

examples.en: She got a perm to add curls.
examples.zh: 她燙髮做出捲度。

examples.en: A perm lasts for several months.
examples.zh: 燙髮可以維持好幾個月。

img: curly permed hair salon rollers

examples.en: Use conditioner after shampoo.
examples.zh: 洗髮後使用潤髮乳。

examples.en: This conditioner makes my hair smooth.
examples.zh: 這款潤髮乳讓我的頭髮很滑順。

img: conditioner bottle shower wet hair

examples.en: This shampoo is good for oily hair.
examples.zh: 這款洗髮精適合油性髮質。

examples.en: She washed her hair with herbal shampoo.
examples.zh: 她用草本洗髮精洗頭。

img: shampoo bottle bubbles shower hair wash

examples.en: She blow-dried her hair after the shower.
examples.zh: 她洗完澡後把頭髮吹乾。

examples.en: The stylist blow-dried it into soft waves.
examples.zh: 髮型師把頭髮吹成柔軟的波浪。

img: hairdryer blowing woman hair salon

examples.en: She used an iron to straighten her hair.
examples.zh: 她用電棒把頭髮拉直。

examples.en: Straightening makes curly hair smooth.
examples.zh: 拉直能讓捲髮變得柔順。

img: flat iron straightening long hair

examples.en: She curled her hair for the wedding.
examples.zh: 她為婚禮把頭髮捲起來。

examples.en: Use a curling iron to curl the ends.
examples.zh: 用電捲棒把髮尾捲起來。

img: curling iron wavy hair styling

examples.en: I want to try a new hairstyle.
examples.zh: 我想試試新髮型。

examples.en: Her short hairstyle suits her well.
examples.zh: 她的短髮型很適合她。

img: woman stylish haircut hairstyle salon mirror

examples.en: She got a manicure before the trip.
examples.zh: 她旅行前做了美甲。

examples.en: A manicure keeps your nails neat.
examples.zh: 美甲能讓指甲整齊。

img: manicure hands painted nails salon

examples.en: She enjoys a pedicure in summer.
examples.zh: 她夏天喜歡做足部護理。

examples.en: The pedicure made her toes look pretty.
examples.zh: 足部護理讓她的腳趾看起來很美。

img: pedicure feet painted toenails spa

examples.en: She painted her nails with red nail polish.
examples.zh: 她用紅色指甲油塗指甲。

examples.en: This nail polish dries quickly.
examples.zh: 這款指甲油乾得很快。

img: nail polish bottle red painting nails

examples.en: Push back your cuticles gently.
examples.zh: 輕輕把甘皮往後推。

examples.en: Cuticle oil keeps your nails healthy.
examples.zh: 甘皮油能讓指甲保持健康。

img: close up fingernail cuticle care tool

examples.en: She shaped her brows with tweezers.
examples.zh: 她用眉夾修出眉形。

examples.en: Use tweezers to pull out the stray hair.
examples.zh: 用鑷子拔掉雜毛。

img: tweezers plucking eyebrow close up

examples.en: This lotion hydrates dry skin.
examples.zh: 這款乳液能為乾燥肌膚補水。

examples.en: Drinking water helps hydrate your skin.
examples.zh: 喝水有助於為皮膚補水。

img: water drops fresh hydrated glowing skin

examples.en: This oil nourishes damaged hair.
examples.zh: 這款油能滋養受損的頭髮。

examples.en: The cream nourishes and softens the skin.
examples.zh: 這款乳霜能滋養並柔嫩肌膚。

img: nourishing oil dropper healthy hair skin

examples.en: She tried a gentle chemical peel.
examples.zh: 她試了溫和的化學煥膚。

examples.en: This peel brightens dull skin.
examples.zh: 這款煥膚能提亮暗沉肌膚。

img: facial peel treatment glowing skin spa

examples.en: She rubbed lotion on her dry hands.
examples.zh: 她把乳液抹在乾燥的手上。

examples.en: Body lotion keeps skin soft after a shower.
examples.zh: 身體乳液能在洗澡後讓肌膚保持柔嫩。

img: body lotion pump bottle hands cream

examples.en: She used a sugar scrub on her lips.
examples.zh: 她用糖磨砂膏護理嘴唇。

examples.en: A body scrub leaves skin smooth.
examples.zh: 身體磨砂膏能讓肌膚變光滑。

img: sugar body scrub jar exfoliating skin

examples.en: She filled in her brows with a pencil.
examples.zh: 她用眉筆把眉毛畫滿。

examples.en: Well-shaped brows frame the face.
examples.zh: 修好的眉毛能襯托臉型。

img: eyebrow pencil shaping brow close up

examples.en: She curled her lashes before mascara.
examples.zh: 她在塗睫毛膏前先夾睫毛。

examples.en: False lashes make eyes look dramatic.
examples.zh: 假睫毛讓眼睛看起來更有神。

img: long eyelashes curler close up eye

examples.en: Her skin looked radiant after the facial.
examples.zh: 做完臉後她的皮膚看起來容光煥發。

examples.en: This cream gives you a radiant glow.
examples.zh: 這款乳霜能讓你散發光采。

img: woman radiant glowing healthy skin light

examples.en: She booked an appointment at the hair salon.
examples.zh: 她在美髮沙龍預約了時間。

examples.en: This salon offers nail and facial services.
examples.zh: 這家沙龍提供美甲和臉部護理服務。

img: modern beauty salon interior chairs mirrors
